findings.summary: Collab protocol/state atomic writer uses a fixed '{path}.tmp' which is not process-safe; concurrent launches can clobber protocol.json/state.json.
findings.recommendation: Use unique tmp names (PID+rand/uuid) or locking for atomic JSON writes during initialization.

findings.summary: Metaswarm commander progress init opens child-agents.jsonl with 'w' (truncates), wiping prior telemetry if re-run against same run dir.
findings.recommendation: On restart/resume, never truncate JSONL; append 'restarted' markers and merge swarm-state updates.

findings.summary: protocol.json uses a single flat required_fields list for all ledgers; reviews commonly omit evidence (yet protocol requires it) while essential review fields (verdict/target refs) are not required.
findings.recommendation: Define per-ledger schemas (required/recommended) and standardize record shapes and event vocabularies.

findings.summary: Commander bundle shape in agents/stampede-commander.agent.md does not specify adopted consensus item_ids nor bundle-level source_refs, but launcher prompt expects them.
findings.recommendation: Align bundle schema with runtime prompt/protocol; add validation for adopted_consensus_item_ids and source_refs.

findings.summary: stampede-monitor.sh reports collab bus progress by wc -l counts only; it does not validate JSON or required fields, so blank/malformed/partial lines can mislead.
findings.recommendation: Count/validate via Python JSONL parser; surface malformed-line counts and required-field violations.

findings.summary: Telemetry parsing in monitor is tolerant (per-line json.loads with try/except), but collab ledgers are never parsed; smoke test does substring checks and may be brittle to malformed/truncated lines.
findings.recommendation: If collab ledgers gain consumers, require tolerant per-line parsing; improve tests to tolerate malformed trailing lines per protocol guidance.

evidence.note: metaswarm creates collab dir and kills existing tmux session (reset semantics)
commander progress dir init; child-agents.jsonl opened with 'w' (truncation)
count_jsonl_lines uses wc -l; collab summary prints counts
bundle shape lacks adopted consensus + source_refs fields
